TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Abdel_Fattah_el-Sisi, title = Abdel_Fattah_el-Sisi, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Abdel_Fattah_el-Sisi} }

S.FORM: == Abdel Fattah el-Sisi == ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 11, Abdel Fattah el-Sisi, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1954) mrhuw Egypt ta' misuw hya' ga Abdel Fattah el-Sisi, aring ryax tay 8 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. pinqbaqan nya Abdel Fattah el-Sisi, t'aring kawas tay 1987 tehuk, mqwas biru sa General Command and Staff Course, Egyptian Command and Staff pqwsan biru krahu. Abdel Fattah el-Sisi, t'aring kawas tay 1992 tehuk, mqwas biru sa General Command and Staff Course, Joint Command and Staff College, United Kingdom. Abdel Fattah el-Sisi, t'aring kawas tay 2003 tehuk, mqwas biru sa War Course, Fellowship of the Higher War College, Nasser Military Academy, Egypt. Abdel Fattah el-Sisi, t'aring kawas tay 2006 tehuk, mqwas biru sa War Course, United States Army War College, United States. qnxan nya Abdel Fattah el-Sisi maki tay kawas 1977 msqun ki Entissar Amer, tehuk misuw qani. Abdel Fattah el-Sisi, minkahul sa Gamaleya na Egypt, 8 mtsswe kwara qutux ngasal nya. Entissar Amer ga, kneril ni Abdel Fattah el-Sisi. Mahmoud, Mostafa, Hassan, ki Aya ga, la'iy ni Abdel Fattah el-Sisi. mintzyuwaw nya maki sa kawas 2012, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi . cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

== Abdel Fattah el-Sisi == ryax sa tay 19 nqu tay 11, Abdel Fattah el-Sisi, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1954) mrhuw Egypt ta' misuw hya' ga Abdel Fattah el-Sisi, aring ryax tay 8 squ byacing tay 6 sa kawas 2014 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. pinqbaqan nya Abdel Fattah el-Sisi, t'aring kawas tay 1987 tehuk, mqwas biru sa General Command and Staff Course, Egyptian Command and Staff pqwsan biru krahu. Abdel Fattah el-Sisi, t'aring kawas tay 1992 tehuk, mqwas biru sa General Command and Staff Course, Joint Command and Staff College, United Kingdom. Abdel Fattah el-Sisi, t'aring kawas tay 2003 tehuk, mqwas biru sa War Course, Fellowship of the Higher War College, Nasser Military Academy, Egypt. Abdel Fattah el-Sisi, t'aring kawas tay 2006 tehuk, mqwas biru sa War Course, United States Army War College, United States. qnxan nya Abdel Fattah el-Sisi maki tay kawas 1977 msqun ki Entissar Amer, tehuk misuw qani. Abdel Fattah el-Sisi, minkahul sa Gamaleya na Egypt, 8 mtsswe kwara qutux ngasal nya. Entissar Amer ga, kneril ni Abdel Fattah el-Sisi. Mahmoud, Mostafa, Hassan, ki Aya ga, la'iy ni Abdel Fattah el-Sisi. mintzyuwaw nya maki sa kawas 2012, t'aring mtzyuwaw zyuwaw na sezi . cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: == aő≤*el *attańß el-s~…ēis~…ēi == rjax s~…ēa taj ** nqu taj **, aő≤*el *attańß el-s~…ēis~…ēi, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw e…£jpt ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a aő≤*el *attańß el-s~…ēis~…ēi, ariŇč rjax taj * s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. pinqő≤aqan nja aő≤*el *attańß el-s~…ēis~…ēi, t ĒariŇč kawas~…ē taj **** teńßuk, mqwas~…ē ő≤iru s~…ēa …£eneral ¶~ ®omman* an* s~…ēta** ¶~ ®ours~…ēe, e…£jptian ¶~ ®omman* an* s~…ēta** pqws~…ēan ő≤iru krańßu. aő≤*el *attańß el-s~…ēis~…ēi, t ĒariŇč kawas~…ē taj **** teńßuk, mqwas~…ē ő≤iru s~…ēa …£eneral ¶~ ®omman* an* s~…ēta** ¶~ ®ours~…ēe, *oint ¶~ ®omman* an* s~…ēta** ¶~ ®olle…£e, unite* kiŇč*om. aő≤*el *attańß el-s~…ēis~…ēi, t ĒariŇč kawas~…ē taj **** teńßuk, mqwas~…ē ő≤iru s~…ēa war ¶~ ®ours~…ēe, *ellows~…ēńßip o* tńße ńßi…£ńßer war ¶~ ®olle…£e, nas~…ēs~…ēer militarj a ¶~ ®a*emj, e…£jpt. aő≤*el *attańß el-s~…ēis~…ēi, t ĒariŇč kawas~…ē taj **** teńßuk, mqwas~…ē ő≤iru s~…ēa war ¶~ ®ours~…ēe, unite* s~…ētates~…ē armj war ¶~ ®olle…£e, unite* s~…ētates~…ē. qnxan nja aő≤*el *attańß el-s~…ēis~…ēi maki taj kawas~…ē **** ms~…ēqun ki entis~…ēs~…ēar amer, teńßuk mis~…ēuw qani. aő≤*el *attańß el-s~…ēis~…ēi, minkańßul s~…ēa …£amaleja na e…£jpt, * mts~…ēs~…ēwe kwara qutux Ňčas~…ēal nja. entis~…ēs~…ēar amer …£a, kneril ni aő≤*el *attańß el-s~…ēis~…ēi. mańßmou*, mos~…ēta*a, ńßas~…ēs~…ēan, ki aja …£a, la Ēij ni aő≤*el *attańß el-s~…ēis~…ēi. mintzjuwaw nja maki s~…ēa kawas~…ē ****, t ĒariŇč mtzjuwaw zjuwaw na s~…ēezi . ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
